Wooting Analog SDK distributable
================================

This directory contains the unmodified 64-bit Windows distributable from
Wooting Analog SDK v0.9.1:

  https://github.com/WootingKb/wooting-analog-sdk/releases/tag/v0.9.1

The SDK documentation instructs applications to ship
wooting_analog_sdk_dist.dll. It delegates to a compatible system SDK when one
is installed and otherwise provides the bundled implementation.

The Wooting Analog SDK is distributed under the Mozilla Public License 2.0.
See COPYING. Corresponding source is available from the versioned release and
repository above.
